news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on April 14, 2025, SKF has finalized the sale of its ring and seal business in Hanover, Pennsylvania, USA, to Carco PRP Group for a total sum of USD 215 million (equivalent to around SEK 2.1 billion). This divestment had been earlier disclosed by the company.
news.headline: SKF sells ring and seal operation in Hanover, USA to Carco PRP Group for USD 215 million (SEK 2.1 billion).

news.summary: The native token of real-world tokenized asset blockchain Mantra, OM, experienced a sudden 90% plunge from $6.30 to below $0.50 on April 13, losing over 90% of its $6 billion market cap. Co-founder John Mullin attributed the crash to centralized exchanges forcibly closing positions without warning. Speculation arose that the team used tokens as collateral for a loan, which led to a margin call, but Mullin denied these claims. The price of OM briefly recovered above $1 before dropping back to around $0.7894, currently down over 91% from its all-time high of nearly $9. Prior to the crash, large amounts of Mantra tokens moved, with some whales incurring an estimated loss of $406.3 million. Mantra had announced a fund to back real-world asset tokenization and received a virtual asset service provider license from Dubai. The article also mentioned a related issue of an illegal arcade disguised as a fake Bitcoin mine in a magazine and scams involving soldiers in China.
news.headline: Mantra token (OM) crashed 90% to $0.50 from $6.30 due to forced closures by exchanges, with a potential blame on one exchange. Staged a minor recovery above $1 but now trading at $0.7894. Spot On Chain revealed whales lost $406.3M. Lookonchain reported 43.6M OM tokens deposited into exchanges since April 7, representing 4.5% of circulating supply. Mantra & DAMAC signed a $1B deal in Jan 2025 for asset tokenization; obtained asset service provider license in Dubai on Feb 19.

news.summary: AtNorth recently reached a deal with Caruna, a Finnish electricity distributor, guaranteeing power supply to its FIN02 data center. This underscores the vital function of data centers in maintaining power stability and supporting Finland's circular economy. The agreement, announced on April 14, 2025, in Helsinki, highlights the growing importance of sustainable practices in data management.
news.headline: atNorth partners with Kesko Corp for heat reuse, secures power with Caruna for its FIN02 data center in Finland, showing data centers' role in stability and circular economy.

news.summary: The Employee Options were exercised by Šiaulių Bankas AB, leading to the transfer of its own shares to employees within the Bank Group. In compliance with Article 19(2) of the Law on Securities of Lithuania, the Bank has released details on its voting rights attached to issued shares, authorized capital size, as well as the number of shares and their nominal value.
news.headline: Employee Options exercised by Šiaulių Bankas AB, transferring shares to staff. Details on voting rights, authorized capital disclosed.

news.summary: Employee stock options awarded for the 2021 performance results were implemented on April 11, 2025. In this process, thirty-five employees of the Bank Group received a total of 1,745,114 Bank shares.
news.headline: Employee stock options vested on April 11, 2025, with 1,745,114 shares transferred to 35 employees of the Bank Group.

news.summary: The recent data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, with over 600,000 new jobs added in the last month alone. This marks a significant improvement in the economy, with the stock market also hitting a new high of 35,000 points. Experts predict that this trend will continue, leading to a boost in consumer spending and overall economic growth. Additionally, the GDP has shown a 5% increase compared to the previous quarter. This positive development is seen as a result of successful government policies and increased investments in key industries.

news.summary: Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) recently confirmed their intention to extend their 2016 share buy-back scheme totaling $30,000,000. As of April 3, 2025, they still had $8,754,827.55 allocated for repurchases within this initiative.
news.headline: Stolt-Nielsen Limited has $8,754,827.55 left from its $30,000,000 share buy-back program started in 2016.
Haslinda Amin provides key updates on 04/14/2025 at Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: The surge in digital platform adoption and advancements in financial technology have increased the demand for collateral-backed loans offering lower interest rates and extended repayment terms. In a report released by Allied Market Research in Wilmington, Del. on April 14, 2025, it was stated that this trend has led to a significant growth in the market.
news.headline: Secured lending market to hit $34.3 trillion by 2033, showing 10.5% CAGR. Rising digital adoption boosts demand for collateral-backed loans with lower rates and longer repayment.

news.summary: Metaplanet has recently purchased an impressive sum of more than 4,500 Bitcoins. The company has expressed its intention to increase their Bitcoin holdings further in the current year. This move comes amidst investor interest in understanding the implications of the most recent U.S. tariff developments.
news.headline: Metaplanet purchases $26M in Bitcoin amidst trade tension, increasing its BTC holdings to over 4,500. Plans to buy more soon.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI) hosted the inaugural FX Developer Co-Creation Event at its headquarters. The event introduced the FX Developer Co-Creation Program, enabling participants to engage in co-creation activities and test rides of the FX prototype. Faraday Future, a California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, showcased their innovative approach to electric vehicles. This event signifies the Company's commitment to involving stakeholders in the development process.
news.headline: FFAI hosts first FX Developer Co-Creation Event at LA HQ, debuting Program with test rides of FX prototype mule.

news.summary: A recent report highlights the increase in global temperatures, with data showing a rise of 1.2 degrees Celsius since the pre-industrial era. The report states that this increase is closely tied to human activities, such as the burning of fossil fuels. The year 2019 was one of the hottest years on record, with the five-year period from 2015 to 2019 being the warmest recorded period. The report emphasizes the urgent need for global action to curb greenhouse gas emissions and limit further temperature rise to avoid catastrophic impacts of climate change.
news.headline: China's exports surge as US tariffs loom, risking trade disruption.

news.summary: Valourec is currently in exclusive discussions to sell Serimax, its subsidiary that specializes in welding solutions, for a total of €79 million.
news.headline: Vallourec in talks to sell Serimax for €79 million, specializing in welding solutions.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in Foussemagne, France at 7:30 am CEST, McPhy Energy, a manufacturer of alkaline electrolyzers, revealed the initiation of a conciliation procedure. This decision was made by the President of the Tribunal de Commerce of Belfort on April 10, 2025. The process will be overseen by SCP Abitbol & Rousselet, led by Maître Joanna Rousselet.
news.headline: McPhy Energy in France initiates conciliation proceedings, with SCP Abitbol & Rousselet as conciliator, announced by the Tribunal de Commerce on April 10, 2025.
China exhibition on 04/14/2025 featured by Bloomberg. Updates on Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: In Vienna on April 14, 2025, Autonomous Medical Devices Incorporated (AMDI) revealed the introduction of their latest product, the Autolab™ HBH system, at the ESCMID Global Congress 2025. This innovative system aims to streamline sample preparation processes and enhance efficiency in medical laboratories worldwide.
news.headline: AMDI debuts Autolab™ HBH at ESCMID 2025, redefining sample prep for molecular diagnostics in Vienna.

news.summary: Last week, the cryptocurrency market experienced a notable recovery due to a temporary ease in President Donald Trump's tariff policies. Onyxcoin, the governance and utility token associated with the Web3 protocol Onyx, stood out by surging 134% and securing a spot on the list of top gainers. This significant spike followed the announcement made by Binance regarding the addition of the coin's futures contract on Friday. Since the beginning of the year, Onyxcoin has impressively surged by 725%, positioning it as the second most successful cryptocurrency in 2025. Binance Futures confirmed the launch of the USDⓈ-M $XCN Perpetual Contract on April 11, 2025, at 15:30 (UTC). For more details, visit the link provided.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency market saw a rebound with Onyxcoin rallying 134% after Binance listing. Onyxcoin up 725% YTD, ranked second in 2025.
Brinc drones on impact of tariffs imposed by Trump administration.

news.summary: In the article, analyst Marko Papic from BCA Research suggests that the recent U.S.-China tariff threats are more symbolic than economically impactful. He downplays the long-term effects of escalating trade tensions and calls the situation "performative" political posturing. China's finance ministry accused the U.S. of "bullying" over tariff policies potentially making America a "joke" globally. Papic notes market reactions fear policy-induced slowdowns, but says concerns are exaggerated. He questions the effectiveness of tariffs and bringing back manufacturing, doubting if these policies will work as intended. Papic points out that U.S. policymakers rarely refer to tariffs as revenue raisers. This analysis is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analyst suggests Trump and Xi Jinping's tariff threats are mainly performative, unlikely to cause major disruptions.

news.summary: Introducing innovative circular recycling technologies, solutions, and case studies for immediate implementation. A thorough display of sustainable and specialty products featuring circular recycling, copolyesters, and bio-based materials in Seongnam, South Korea on April 14, 2025.
news.headline: SK chemicals will showcase sustainable material solutions at CHINAPLAS 2025, including circular recycling, copolyesters, and bio-based materials.

news.summary: Basel, 14 April 2025 - Roche announced that the European Commission has given the green light to Columvi® (glofitamab) when used with gemcitabine and oxaliplatin (GemOx) to treat adult patients with relapsed or refractory (R/R) diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) who are not eligible for autologous stem cell transplant (ASCT). This marks the first approval of a bispecific antibody regimen for DLBCL in Europe for patients whose cancer has returned or who did not respond to initial treatment. Columbia initially received conditional marketing authorization in July 2023 for R/R DLBCL post two or more lines of systemic therapy. The recent approval fulfills the condition to convert the current marketing authorization to regular approval.
news.headline: European Commission approves Roche’s Columvi as the first bispecific antibody for relapsed or refractory DLBCL.

news.summary: In the latest report on the economy, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, which marks a significant decrease from the previous month. This decrease translates to roughly 450,000 more people finding jobs. Additionally, the GDP has seen a growth of 5.1% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong economic recovery. The stock market has also experienced a notable increase, with the S&P 500 reaching an all-time high of 4,500 points. These positive economic indicators have boosted consumer confidence and are contributing to overall optimism about the country's financial outlook.
news.headline: China's tariff retaliation could affect South Korea's bonds and currency.

news.summary: The recent report revealed that the economy grew by 6.5% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. Additionally, jobless claims dropped to 360,000 last week, indicating a positive trend in the labor market. Inflation rose by 2.5% in June, slightly higher than predicted. The housing market also saw a significant increase, with home sales jumping by 10% compared to last year. Overall, the economic indicators point towards a robust recovery and promising growth prospects.
news.headline: Olam to allocate $2B from Saudi sale towards reducing its debt burden.
Japanese Industrial Output Prelim MoM SA Actual 2.3% (Forecast -, Previous 2.5%)
Japanese Capacity Utilization MoM Actual -1.1% (Forecast -, Previous 4.5%)

news.summary: A recent report reveals that global carbon emissions reached a record high in 2021, hitting 40.2 billion tons. This is a 6% increase from 2020 and surpasses the pre-pandemic levels. The surge was driven by a rise in coal and gas consumption. The report also highlights that China remains the world's largest emitter, followed by the U.S. and India. Additionally, the data shows that the European Union managed to reduce its emissions by 7% in the same period. Experts warn that if urgent action is not taken to curb emissions, the world will face severe consequences from climate change.
news.headline: Rise in Chinese exports anticipated before US tariffs affecting trade reports.

news.summary: In Antwerp on April 14, 2025, CMB.TECH NV (NYSE: CMBT & Euronext: CMBT) inked a deal with Fortescue for chartering a cutting-edge ammonia-powered vessel, showcasing their dedication to green initiatives in shipping. The vessel, a 210,000 deadweight tonnage (dwt) ammonia-powered Newcastlemax, will be equipped with a dual fuel engine. It is anticipated to be ready for operation by the conclusion of 2026.
news.headline: Fortescue and CMB.TECH partner for ammonia-powered ore carrier, 210,000-dwt vessel to be delivered by 2026.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency of a project focusing on real-world assets experienced a drastic crash recently, plummeting by close to 90% in a matter of 90 minutes on Sunday. The OM token belonging to the Layer-1 blockchain MANTRA saw its value drop from $5.26 to $0.42, resulting in a loss of $4.6 billion in market capitalization. This sudden downturn led to liquidations totaling more than $68 million for OM within the last 24 hours, as reported by Coinglass. Lookonchain revealed that approximately 17 wallets transferred $227 worth of OM tokens to exchanges, accounting for 4.5% of the circulating supply, with two of these wallets linked to Laser Digital, a significant investor in MANTRA. The plummet in $OM was preceded by activities involving at least 17 entities prior to the crash on April 7. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: OM Token crashes 90% to $0.42 from $5.26; wipes out $4.6 billion market cap. 17 wallets transfer $227 OM to exchanges. Liquidations hit $68 million. CEO vows to mend the situation.

news.summary: In Singapore on April 14, 2025, ABC Impact, an investment firm focusing on Asia, announced the successful conclusion of fundraising for its second fund, surpassing USD 600 million. This achievement marks a significant increase from its first fund's size, effectively doubling its total capital. The firm's enhanced financial capacity underscores its dedication to addressing crucial issues in Asia through impactful investments.
news.headline: ABC Impact closes Fund II at over USD 600M, doubling size with commitments from Asian Development Bank, Temasek Trust, Temasek, and other leading investors.

news.summary: In Burbank, California on April 14, 2025, Mission Valley Bank has appointed Michael Carlson, CFA as the new Senior Vice President and SBA National Sales Manager. This move emphasizes the bank's dedication to fostering small business expansion nationwide.
news.headline: Mission Valley Bank appoints Michael Carlson as Senior Vice President, SBA National Sales Manager, emphasizing small business growth commitment.

news.summary: In Milan, a renowned Scandinavian brand known as ASKO, specializing in top-tier kitchen, laundry, and professional equipment, is marking 75 years of groundbreaking advancements since introducing its initial washing machine. To commemorate this milestone, they are hosting an interactive showcase at Milan Design Week spanning from April 8 to 13. The event also serves as the platform for unveiling a new product line.
news.headline: ASKO celebrates 75 years of innovation at Milan Design Week with interactive exhibition, marking milestones since first washing machine.
